title: Strobilanthes isophylla

Strobilanthes isophylla is native to the tropical regions of Asia, where it grows as a terrestrial or epiphytic plant. The classification of Strobilanthes isophylla reflects its unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Acanthaceae family.
